name: Flat-Field Illumination Correction
description: Perform pseudo-flat-field correction on the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image to fix uneven illumination. Document the mean intensity in four quadrants (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right) before and after correction to demonstrate improved uniformity. Save the corrected image to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/flatfield_corrected.tif and a CSV report with columns 'Quadrant', 'Mean_Before', and 'Mean_After' to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/illumination_report.csv.
